title: Russian strikes kill 10 as Zelensky says Ukraine hits oil tankers and terminal
Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
With World Distracted by War, Extremist Settlers Intensify Attacks in West Bank
text: Israel has failed to arrest a wave of violence against Palestinians, prompting military officials to urge the government to intervene.
